description: Sprint 4 golden dataset — human-verified canonical values for 20 anchor rules. CI (Sprint 5) cross-checks src/registry/seed/*.ts against these values. A mismatch fails the PR with a diff message so reviewer can either (a) update the seed to match EUR-Lex/UNECE ground truth or (b) update the golden dataset with a rationale.
review_notes: First-pass golden for Path B Sprint 4. Values derived from direct inspection of EUR-Lex eli/ and UNECE regulation pages. EUR-Lex CELEX IDs are canonical. OJ references follow the 'OJ L N, DD.MM.YYYY' legacy format for pre-2023 acts and the new 'OJ L, YYYY/NNNN, DD Month YYYY' format for 2023+. Intentional scope: EU horizontal + key UNECE. DE overlay rules excluded (sourced from national gazettes, not SPARQL-accessible).

anchors.title: EU Whole Vehicle Type-Approval Framework
anchors.review_notes: Framework regulation for M/N/O WVTA. No amendments affecting temporal since 2018.

anchors.title: L-category Vehicle Type-Approval Framework
anchors.review_notes: L-category framework.

anchors.title: General Safety Regulation 2
anchors.review_notes: GSR2 framework. Delegated acts per feature (ISA/EDR/AEB/DMS/TPMS) have separate phase-in.

anchors.title: GSR2 Intelligent Speed Assistance (ISA)
anchors.review_notes: ISA delegated implementing act. UX-005 regression anchor.

anchors.title: GSR2 Event Data Recorder (EDR)
anchors.review_notes: EDR delegated regulation.

anchors.title: GSR2 Driver Drowsiness and Attention Warning (DDAW)
anchors.review_notes: DDAW delegated regulation.

anchors.title: GSR2 Advanced Emergency Braking System (AEBS)
anchors.review_notes: AEBS implementing regulation.

anchors.title: GSR2 Tyre Pressure Monitoring System (TPMS)
anchors.review_notes: TPMS covered via UN R141 reference; GSR2 aligns.

anchors.title: R155 Cybersecurity Management System
anchors.review_notes: R155 CSMS. Current revision referenced Rev.5 (2024). Seed currently lists Rev.2 — UX-005 drift candidate.

anchors.title: R156 Software Update Management System
anchors.review_notes: R156 SUMS with RXSWIN requirements.

anchors.title: R157 Automated Lane Keeping System (ALKS)
anchors.review_notes: R157 ALKS. L3 only. Custom evaluator rejects non-L3 configs — see Sprint 2 UX-006 fix.

anchors.title: UN R171 Driver Control Assistance Systems (DCAS)
anchors.review_notes: R171 DCAS. 'If fitted' trigger — custom evaluator. L2+ systems with sustained lateral+longitudinal control.

anchors.title: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
anchors.review_notes: GDPR. Horizontal. Applies when vehicle processes personal data.

anchors.title: EU Data Act
anchors.review_notes: Data Act. Connected product data access obligations.

anchors.title: AI Act — Prohibited Practices and AI Literacy
anchors.review_notes: AI Act Phase 1 — Art. 1-5 prohibited practices + Art. 4 AI literacy.

anchors.title: AI Act — High-Risk AI Systems (Annex III)
anchors.review_notes: AI Act Art. 6(2) + Annex III standalone high-risk use cases (biometric, etc).

anchors.title: AI Act — Safety Components in Regulated Products (Art. 6(1))
anchors.review_notes: AI Act Art. 6(1) + Annex I Section B (2018/858 + 2019/2144). Applies when AI is safety component of type-approved product.

anchors.title: EU Battery Regulation
anchors.review_notes: Battery Reg parent. Sub-obligations phased: labelling 2024, carbon footprint 2025, battery passport 2027-02-18, due diligence 2025.

anchors.title: Euro 7 Emission Standard — Light-Duty Vehicles
anchors.review_notes: Euro 7 framework Reg (EU) 2024/1257. Implementing Regs 2025/1706 (exhaust) + 2025/1707 (OBFCM/EVP) are separate rules if modeled.

anchors.title: UNECE R100 Electric Vehicle Safety
anchors.review_notes: R100. Latest revision Rev.4 Am.1 (2025-01-10). Seed currently lists Rev.3 Am.4 — drift candidate (noted §3.2 DE-depth table).

anchors.title: Product Liability Directive (revised)
anchors.review_notes: PLD 2024/2853. Directive (not regulation) — requires member-state transposition. UX-004 trigger fix applied Sprint 2.
